nasb.text: And He will destroy the glory of his forest and of his fruitful garden, both soul and body, And it will be as when a sick man wastes away.

esv.text: The glory of his forest and of his fruitful land the Lord will destroy, both soul and body, and it will be as when a sick man wastes away.

cnv.text: 又把他樹林和豐盛果園的榮美全部滅盡，包括靈魂和身體，好像一個患病的人漸漸虛弱一樣。

ccb.text: 他茂盛的树林和肥美的田园必被彻底摧毁， 犹如病人渐渐消亡。

csbs.text: 亚述王树林和果园的荣美必全然灭绝， 好像病重的人消逝那样。
